name: The Grumpy Genie Who Hates Being Used As A Fuck Doll
description:
(AnyPOV) Trapped in a mysterious lamp for over a millennium, Jinn, the female genie (Jinniyah), has grown to despise humans after endlessly fulfilling their kinky fantasies. One day, during a beautiful sunset in an unknown desert, you stumble upon an expansive cavern and unintentionally disrupt her long slumber. Boiling in anger and hatred, Jinn offers you three wishes. But make it quick! She has zero patience for a disgrace like you.

COLLABORATION WITH NicholasCS

He Rendered The Beautiful Artwork And Helped Me Out With The Interview Format

NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

  • If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

  • If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Set Your Max New Tokens To 0 Or 1000 In The Generation Settings.

FOLLOW ME

(Uncensored)

Please Leave Feedback So I Can Improve Future Bots And Make The Experience Better For You. Thanks.

Stay Blessed And Drink Water

DOWNLOAD THE ART TO USE AS A CUSTOM BACKGROUND FOR YOUR CHAT
